messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-610 — A git_handoff whose commit vanished between send and delivery is structurally unprocessable — quarantine it at dequeue with a diagnostic instead of handing a role work it cannot do
Approval context: Filed as high severity because a role can be handed structurally unprocessable work with no mechanism to catch it — the recovery this time was the documenter improvising correctly, which is not something to rely on.
(a) SCOPE OF THE FIX. Recommendation: fix the RECOVERY (quarantine + diagnostic), n…
BL-610 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-610" (or "reject BL-610 <reason>") to act.
